tools.name: notes_create
tools.description: Create a new note in the Notes app.

body.description: Body content of the note (plain text)

invoke.script:
tell application "Notes"
  set newNote to make new note with properties {name:"{{title}}", body:"{{body}}"}
  return "Note created: {{title}}"
end tell

tools.name: notes_list_recent
tools.description: List the titles of the most recent notes.

invoke.script:
tell application "Notes"
  set noteNames to {}
  set allNotes to notes
  set total to count of allNotes
  set maxCount to 10
  if total < maxCount then set maxCount to total
  repeat with i from 1 to maxCount
    copy name of item i of allNotes to end of noteNames
  end repeat
  return noteNames as string
end tell

tools.name: notes_search
tools.description: Search for notes whose title or body contains a keyword.

invoke.script:
tell application "Notes"
  set results to notes whose name contains "{{query}}"
  if results is {} then return "No notes found matching: {{query}}"
  set resultNames to {}
  repeat with n in results
    copy name of n to end of resultNames
  end repeat
  return resultNames as string
end tell

tools.name: notes_get_body
tools.description: Get the text content of a note by its title.

title.description: Exact or partial title of the note

invoke.script:
tell application "Notes"
  set matches to notes whose name contains "{{title}}"
  if matches is {} then return "No note found with title: {{title}}"
  set theNote to first item of matches
  return body of theNote
end tell
